data.name: pnl_permissions.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="panel12" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel11" Row="5" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel10" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel9" Row="4" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel8" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel7" Row="3" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel6" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel5" Row="2" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel4" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel3" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="1" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="panel1" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,50,Percent,50" /><Rows Styles="Percent,16.66667,Percent,16.66667,Percent,16.66667,Percent,16.66667,Percent,16.66667,Percent,16.66667" /></TableLayoutSettings>

data.name: label_title.Font
data.value: Segoe UI Variable Display Semib, 15.5pt, style=Bold
